metadata.description: Claude Code Dev Team — 12 specialized subagents + 18 automation hooks (incl. optional MemPalace cross-session memory) + P7/P9/P10 methodology.

plugins.name: devteam
plugins.description: An engineering team in a box. Installs 12 subagents and 18 hooks in one command (3 hooks integrate with optional MemPalace MCP for cross-session memory). Includes the P7/P9/P10 methodology and three red lines discipline.
